implementationNotes: Draft PR #35 created — awaiting Terraform plan

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote:
## Terraform Resources Created

### New Resources (cosmos.tf)
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_account.main` — Serverless SQL API account: `cosmos-sample-app-{suffix}`
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_database.main` — Database: `sample-app-db`
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container.webhooks` — Container: `Webhooks` (partition key: `/workspaceId`)
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_role_assignment.func_data_contributor` — Function App MI → Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor (zero-key auth)

### Modified Resources
- `azurerm_function_app_flex_consumption.main` — Added `COSMOSDB_ENDPOINT` app setting (references `azurerm_cosmosdb_account.main.endpoint`)
- `azurerm_api_management_api.sample` — OpenAPI spec updated with `GET /webhooks` (listWebhooks) and `POST /webhooks` (createWebhook)

### New Outputs (outputs.tf)
- `cosmosdb_endpoint` — Cosmos DB account endpoint URL
- `cosmosdb_account_name` — Cosmos DB account name

### Hooks Updated
- `.apm/hooks/validate-infra.sh` — Added Cosmos DB reachability check (reads `COSMOSDB_ENDPOINT` env var)

### Terraform Plan
Plan: 4 to add, 4 to change, 0 to destroy. Validated successfully.

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added fn-webhooks.ts with POST/GET /api/webhooks endpoints using Cosmos DB (DefaultAzureCredential, zero API keys). Lazy-init CosmosClient singleton, Zod validation, parameterized queries. Modified deploy-backend.yml to inject WEBHOOK_TIMEOUT_MS=5000 app setting. Added validate-app.sh curl check for /webhooks endpoint reachability.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: Added /webhooks page with webhook URL registration form and list table (use client, static export compatible). Added Webhooks nav link to NavBarShell. E2E tests cover form rendering, registration, persistence, and NavBar navigation.

items.label: Dead Code Eliminated
items.docNote: Dead code scan complete. Roam structural analysis (roam_dead_code, roam_uses, roam_batch_get, roam_deps) found NO dead code within the webhook-dispatcher feature scope (apps/sample-app). All symbols are actively referenced: fn-webhooks.ts (5 symbols), webhooks/page.tsx (2 symbols), packages/schemas/src/webhooks.ts (6 symbols). CreateWebhookRequest type has 0 external consumers but is a public API type in the protected packages/schemas barrel export — retained per safety rules. All existing app utilities (apiClient, authConfig, demoAuthContext, NavBar, ThemeToggle) have active consumers. No orphaned files or unreachable routes detected. Backend tests: 34 passed. Frontend tests: 14 passed.

{"fault_domain":"deployment-stale","diagnostic_trace":"Phase 1 HTTP smoke: root / returns 200, /about returns 200, but /webhooks returns 404 (Azure SWA default 404 page). /webhooks.html also returns 404. Searched all 11 deployed JS chunks for string webhook \u2014 zero matches found. Feature code exists on branch: commit f9e3177 (2026-04-03T05:28:58Z) added apps/sample-app/frontend/src/app/webhooks/page.tsx and modified NavBar.tsx. deploy-frontend.yml triggers on apps/*/frontend/** paths on feature/** branches, so f9e3177 should have triggered a deployment. However, the deployed SWA at https://wonderful-grass-0ef9b920f.4.azurestaticapps.net does not contain the webhooks page. Pre-existing routes (/about) work correctly, confirming SWA is healthy but serving a stale build. All 12 commits after f9e3177 are either pipeline state updates with [skip ci] or backend-only changes that would not retrigger the frontend deploy workflow. The frontend deploy workflow either failed, was cancelled by concurrency, or never completed. Resolution: manually trigger deploy-frontend.yml via workflow_dispatch or push a no-op change to apps/sample-app/frontend/ without [skip ci]."}

Re-deployment cycle 2/3: Phase 1 HTTP smoke: root / returns 200, /about returns 200, but /webhooks returns 404 (Azure SWA default 404 page). /webhooks.html also returns 404. Searched all 11 deployed JS chunks for string webhook — zero matches found. Feature code exists on branch: commit f9e3177 (2026-04-03T05:28:58Z) added apps/sample-app/frontend/src/app/webhooks/page.tsx and modified NavBar.tsx. deploy-frontend.yml triggers on apps/*/frontend/** paths on feature/** branches, so f9e3177 should have triggered a deployment. However, the deployed SWA at https://wonderful-grass-0ef9b920f.4.azurestaticapps.net does not contain the webhooks page. Pre-existing routes (/about) work correctly, confirming SWA is healthy but serving a stale build. All 12 commits after f9e3177 are either pipeline state updates with [skip ci] or backend-only changes that would not retrigger the frontend deploy workflow. The frontend deploy workflow either failed, was cancelled by concurrency, or never completed. Resolution: manually trigger deploy-frontend.yml via workflow_dispatch or push a no-op change to apps/sample-app/frontend/ without [skip ci].. Reset 4 items: push-app, poll-app-ci, live-ui, integration-test
